title: What to Know About Iran and the Houthis
summary_full: The Yemeni militant group appeared to open a new front in the conflict between its backer, Iran, and the United States, by attacking ships and announcing a blockade on a strategic waterway.
summary_public: The Yemeni militant group appeared to open a new front in the conflict between its backer, Iran, and the United States, by attacking ships and announcing a blockade on a strategic waterway.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: its backer, Iran, and the United States, by attacking ships
